## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what went wrong.

## To Reproduce

The exact command you ran, and the relevant parts of your `config.yaml` (if
any):

```
smelt transcode ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- smelt version (`smelt version`):
- ffmpeg version (`ffmpeg -version | head -1`):
- OS and architecture:

## Log output

Full log output, ideally run with `--log-level debug`:

```
<paste here>
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (source file details, hardware acceleration
in use, etc.).
